title: Genomics of MPN progression.
author: Patel AA Odenike O
content: S-EPMC7727554 PMC7727554 Genomics of MPN progression. The Philadelphia chromosome-negative (Ph-) myeloproliferative neoplasms (MPNs) are a heterogenous group of hematopoietic stem cell diseases characterized by activated JAK/STAT signaling and a variable propensity toward myelofibrotic and leukemic
